title: नवग्रह स्तोत्रम् (बृहस्पति)
devanagariText:
॥ श्री बृहस्पति स्तोत्रम् ॥

देवानां च ऋषीणां च गुरुं काञ्चनसन्निभम्।
बुद्धिमन्तं त्रिलोकेशं तं नमामि बृहस्पतिम्॥ १॥

सुराचार्यं सुतेजसं गुरुं पीतवर्णधरम्।
सर्वज्ञं सर्वलोकज्ञं प्रणमामि बृहस्पतिम्॥ २॥

वेदशास्त्रप्रवक्तारं देवमन्त्रोपदेशकम्।
दैत्यदानवविद्वेषिणं प्रणमामि बृहस्पतिम्॥ ३॥

गुरुवारप्रियं देवं पीतपुष्पसमर्चितम्।
चणकदालप्रियं नित्यं प्रणमामि बृहस्पतिम्॥ ४॥

धनुर्मीनराशीशं गुरुदशासुखकारकम्।
सर्वविद्याप्रदातारं प्रणमामि बृहस्पतिम्॥ ५॥

बृहस्पतिस्तोत्रमिदं यः पठेद्गुरुवासरे।
गुरुपीडा न बाधेत सर्वज्ञानमवाप्नुयात्॥

॥ इति श्री बृहस्पति स्तोत्रम् सम्पूर्णम् ॥
benefits: Sacred Navagraha Stotram Brihaspati for devotion and spiritual growth
Invokes blessings of Brihaspati in all forms
Traditionally recited for removal of sins and bestows spiritual merit
Ideal for Brihaspati festivals and daily worship
description: Dedicated to the Nine Planets (Navagraha), the Navagraha Stotram Brihaspati (नवग्रह स्तोत्रम् (बृहस्पति)) is a devotional hymn of praise revered in Hindu tradition. Attributed to Purana Tradition, this prayer holds a special place in Hindu devotional literature. Regular recitation is believed to grant divine protection and auspiciousness, invoke blessings of Brihaspati in all forms, and remove sins and bestow spiritual merit. This prayer is traditionally recited on Thursday (Guruvar) and during Guru Purnima to invoke divine grace. Comprising 5 verses, it can be completed in approximately 3 minutes, making it suitable for daily devotional practice. On this page, you can read the complete Navagraha Stotram Brihaspati in Devanagari Sanskrit with English transliteration, Hindi meaning (arth), and free PDF download for offline recitation.
seoDescription: Read Navagraha Stotram Brihaspati in Sanskrit with Hindi meaning. Sacred hymn for Brihaspati devotion and blessings.
